genre_preference.value: documentary, found footage, horror, comedy, family
evidence: "I love movies based on real life events and this one didn't disappoint."
"If it's found footage of aliens or bigfoot, I'm a happy girl. Loved it!"
"Some of the best movies I have ever watched are those which start slowly and immediately pick up speed and grab your whole attention."
"Really a good movie. No drop outs or slow spots, simply an entertaining movie."
"I just don't get it. Why are there so many 1* and 2* reviews for this movie when it's got to be one of the best of the 'found footage' genre to come around since The Blair Witch Project???"
"This was, without a doubt, THE worst movie I have ever watched in my life, lol. It's sort of like the old adage about a train wreck: You want to stop watching but you have to see it through."
"Well made and well filmed, it holds your attention from beginning to end."
"Powers Boothe captures the essence of Jim Jones as no other actor could. The Guyana events are told in all their tragic sadness."
"I'm a huge Kevin Durand fan and that's the main reason I purchased this movie."
"I have been a John Wayne fan most of my life and when I just happened across this Blu-ray, I snapped it up."
"This documentary based on true events was mind-blowing."
"This was great! I especially liked the ending which left this fan with an X-Files vibe."
"The Guyana events are told in all their tragic sadness."
"I couldn't tell you the number of times he and watched this together on VHS and enjoyed it immensely each time."

summary: The user enjoys a variety of genres, particularly documentaries and found footage films, often appreciating well-made productions. They prefer fast-paced narratives with high emotional resonance, indicating a strong connection to the stories and characters they engage with.
